message:
fix(guard): WORKTREES_ENABLED=false no longer disables file reservation guard

The is_guard_gated_from_values fallback chain incorrectly used
WORKTREES_ENABLED and GIT_IDENTITY_ENABLED to gate the file reservation
guard system. Setting WORKTREES_ENABLED=false (meaning worktrees are
disabled) would also disable the entire file reservation enforcement,
which is semantically wrong -- those env vars control their own features
and should not influence whether file reservations are enforced.

Now only FILE_RESERVATIONS_ENFORCEMENT_ENABLED controls the guard gate,
defaulting to true (active) when unset. WORKTREES_ENABLED and
GIT_IDENTITY_ENABLED are accepted but ignored for gating purposes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
